dialogos.texto_en: Ah, that's right.\nWhy don't we take Raiha-chan along with us?
Raiha too?\nWell, I'm concerned about travel expenses.
Don't worry about the details.\nI want to take her with us.
Well, she is like family to me, after all.
...I see. In that case, please bring Raiha too.
What are you two blushing about?
(There's no way out!\n Even Itsuki blushes when she says it herself!)
You were so quick to say that they're like family,\nbut you sure took your time to answer him before.
W-well, I took my time with my response\nbecause I was considering marriage!
...Huh?
AH!!
Oh, I see, I see. That's how it was.\nYou were really agonizing over it, weren't you,\nItsuki-chan.
That's because Itsuki is so serious at trying her best at all times.
I-I, uh, just remembered something I have to do!\nExcuse me!
Itsuki, whoa.\nCalm down.
Oo-ooohh...
(Oh, I see,\n Itsuki was prepared to face me to that extent.)
(If that's the case, then I must also face Itsuki's\n determination properly.)
(I know that, and yet the relationship between Itsuki\n and I hasn't really progressed since I confessed...)
(Both of us had exams, and honestly,\n we didn't have any spare time.)
(Not only that, with exams being over and me\n moving to Tokyo, we're going to be in a\n so-called long-distance relationship.)
(Although we are both determined, a long-distance\n relationship between two people who are inexperienced\n in love... It honestly makes me worry.)
(That's why, on this trip, I want to deepen my bond\n with Itsuki even more.\n And for that reason...!)
(During this trip! I will KISS HER!!)
(Well, in other words,\n we haven't actually kissed yet...)
(Time for the games to begin,\n Uesugi Futaro!!)
